001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.storage;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.configuration.StorageConfiguration;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.configuration.StorageConfiguration.FilenameProperties;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.configuration.StorageConfiguration.FilenameProperties.TimestampProperties;
006import java.io.IOException;
007import java.nio.ByteBuffer;
008import java.nio.file.Files;
009import java.nio.file.Path;
010import java.text.DateFormat;
011import java.text.SimpleDateFormat;
012import java.util.Base64;
013import java.util.List;
014import java.util.Set;
015import java.util.TimeZone;
016import java.util.UUID;
017import java.util.regex.Matcher;
018import java.util.regex.Pattern;
019import java.util.stream.Collectors;
020import java.util.stream.IntStream;
021import org.jspecify.annotations.NonNull;
022import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
023import org.springframework.boot.system.ApplicationHome;
024import org.springframework.core.io.Resource;
025import org.springframework.core.io.UrlResource;
026import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
027import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
028import org.springframework.web.HttpMediaTypeException;
029import org.springframework.web.HttpMediaTypeNotSupportedException;
030import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
031
032/**
033 * {@link StorageService} implementation that stores content on the local file system.
034 */
035@Service
036public class LocalFileSystemStorageService implements StorageService {
037
038  private final Path uploadDirectory;
039  private final Pattern subdirectoryPattern;
040  private final DateFormat formatter;
041  private final String filenameFormat;
042  private final int randomizerLimit;
043  private final List<MediaType> contentTypes;
044
045  private Set<String> whiteList;
046
047  /**
048   * Creates a storage service configured by {@link StorageConfiguration}.
049   *
050   * @param storageConfiguration storage configuration properties.
051   * @param applicationHome application home, used when storage is configured relative to the app.
052   */
053  @Autowired
054  public LocalFileSystemStorageService(
055      StorageConfiguration storageConfiguration,
056      ApplicationHome applicationHome
057  ) {
058    FilenameProperties filenameProperties = storageConfiguration.getFilename();
059    TimestampProperties timestampProperties = filenameProperties.getTimestamp();
060    String uploadPath = storageConfiguration.getDirectory();
061
062    uploadDirectory = storageConfiguration.isApplicationHome()
063        ? applicationHome.getDir().toPath().resolve(uploadPath)
064        : Path.of(uploadPath);
065
066    //noinspection ResultOfMethodCallIgnored
067    uploadDirectory.toFile().mkdirs();
068
069    subdirectoryPattern = storageConfiguration.getSubdirectoryPattern();
070    whiteList = storageConfiguration.getWhiteList();
071
072    contentTypes = whiteList
073        .stream()
074        .map(MediaType::valueOf)
075        .toList();
076
077    filenameFormat = filenameProperties.getFormat();
078    randomizerLimit = filenameProperties.getRandomizerLimit();
079
080    formatter = new SimpleDateFormat(timestampProperties.getFormat());
081
082    formatter.setTimeZone(TimeZone.getTimeZone(timestampProperties.getTimeZone()));
083  }
084
085  @Override
086  public String store(MultipartFile file) throws IOException, HttpMediaTypeException {
087    String contentType = file.getContentType() != null ? file.getContentType() : "";
088
089    if (!whiteList.contains(file.getContentType())) {
090      throw new HttpMediaTypeNotSupportedException(contentType, contentTypes);
091    }
092
093    String originalFilename = file.getOriginalFilename();
094    UUID uuid = UUID.randomUUID();
095    ByteBuffer buffer = ByteBuffer.allocate(16);
096    buffer.putLong(uuid.getMostSignificantBits());
097    buffer.putLong(uuid.getLeastSignificantBits());
098
099    String encoded = Base64.getUrlEncoder()
100        .withoutPadding()
101        .encodeToString(buffer.array());
102
103    String newFilename = filenameFormat
104        .formatted(
105            encoded,
106            getExtension(
107                (originalFilename != null)
108                    ? originalFilename
109                    : ""
110            )
111        );
112
113    String subdirectory = getSubdirectory(newFilename);
114
115    Path resolvedPath = uploadDirectory.resolve(subdirectory);
116
117    //noinspection ResultOfMethodCallIgnored
118    resolvedPath.toFile().mkdirs();
119
120    Files.copy(file.getInputStream(), resolvedPath.resolve(newFilename));
121
122    return newFilename;
123  }
124
125  @Override
126  public Resource retrieve(String key) throws IOException {
127    String subdirectory = getSubdirectory(key);
128
129    Path path = uploadDirectory.resolve(subdirectory).resolve(key);
130
131    return new UrlResource(path.toUri());
132  }
133
134  @Override
135  public boolean delete(String key)
136      throws IOException, UnsupportedOperationException, SecurityException {
137
138    String subdirectory = getSubdirectory(key);
139    Path path = uploadDirectory.resolve(subdirectory).resolve(key);
140
141    if (Files.exists(path)) {
142      Files.delete(path);
143      return true;
144    } else {
145      return false;
146    }
147  }
148
149
150  @NonNull
151  private String getExtension(@NonNull String filename) {
152    int position = filename.lastIndexOf('.');
153
154    return (position >= 0) ? filename.substring(position + 1) : "";
155  }
156
157  private String getSubdirectory(@NonNull String filename) {
158
159    Matcher matcher = subdirectoryPattern.matcher(filename);
160
161    return matcher.matches()
162        ? IntStream.rangeClosed(1, matcher.groupCount())
163        .mapToObj(matcher::group)
164        .collect(Collectors.joining("/"))
165        : "";
166  }
167
168}
